description: Rank models by ATC + purchase events, not by offline eval scores. Cheapest performant model wins.

panels.title: 🏆 Which model is winning right now?

panels.description: Top 10 models ranked by Add-to-Cart events in the last hour, taken from the NeonCart chatbot's input token traffic. Eval scores are theory; ATC is a real business outcome.
panels.title: 🤖 Which models drove the most Add-to-Carts? (1h)

panels.description: Same data as the bar chart on the left, laid out as a horizontal leaderboard. Use whichever shape your eye prefers.
panels.title: 🔥 ATC leaderboard — same data, leaderboard view (1h)
📈 How is each model trending — and which is cheapest per ATC?

panels.description: Add-to-Cart rate per model over time (5m sliding window). Use this to see model rotations or rollouts taking effect — one model rising as another falls.
panels.title: ATC rate per model over time

panels.description: USD spent per ATC event for each model, last hour. The lowest number is the model giving you the most conversions for your dollar. Green is good.
panels.title: 💸 Cheapest model per ATC (lower is better, 1h)
📋 The full scorecard — every metric, every model

panels.description: One row per model with every signal you need to pick a winner: ATC volume, output/input token ratio (proxy for verbosity), p50 latency, and dollars per ATC. Sort by any column. All numbers are 1h windows.
panels.title: 🏁 Full leaderboard — ATC, conversion, latency, $ per ATC (1h)
💰 Cost vs latency — what's each model costing and how fast is it?

panels.description: Stacked **USD per hour** by model (5m rate × 3600). Whichever band is widest is currently eating your budget. Anthropic models tend to dominate even at low call volumes because they're ~10× the per-token price of Ollama-local.
panels.title: 💰 Spend rate per model — USD per hour

panels.description: p95 of gen_ai client request duration per model — 95 out of 100 calls finish faster than this. Spikes here mean tail-latency pain that users will feel.
panels.title: ⏱ How slow is the worst 5% of requests per model? (p95)
🆚 Ollama vs Claude — the case for routing to local models

panels.description: USD spent per token processed, last 24h. Higher = pricier per unit of work. Claude lines up at the top, Ollama at the bottom — which is exactly why routing decisions matter.
panels.title: 💵 Which models cost the most per token? (top 10, 24h)

panels.description: 24h total spend split by provider: anthropic (Claude, red) vs ollama (local, green). The gap between the two bars is the ROI of the Ollama-first routing strategy in a single picture.
panels.title: 🆚 Claude vs Ollama — total spend side by side (24h)
🔄 Is the Ollama lockstep rotation actually rotating?

panels.description: Every Ollama-bound specialist in the cluster flips to the SAME model every 5 minutes (epoch_seconds // 300 % len(pool)). You should see one model band dominant per ~5-minute slice with clean handoffs. If colors mix mid-slice, rotation is broken on some pod.
panels.title: 🔄 Lockstep rotation timeline — one model per 5-minute slice

title: AI o11y — Best Models (ranked by ATC)
